title: TrickedSquire Essentials
description:
It contains everything needed to make Minecraft an immersive and simpler experience, and is a modpack that smoothly modifies the Minecraft vanilla experience. 
It is server-side compatible and includes proximity voice chat.
body:
**_The mod name refers to the mods that I find essential to make my gaming experience comfortable._**

**This modpack makes the vanilla experience much more immersive and comfortable, with mods that smoothly alter the way we interact with the game, adding skills and more decoration blocks, a voice chat and many options in the game interface, plus many optimisation mods for optimal gameplay.**

**With this, I'm looking to save players time by looking for mods that improve the vanilla experience, as there are many good mods that alter gameplay from HUD, POV, skills, performance, that are hard to find or have unintuitive names. Also, many times we don't know everything we need to get the game experience we are looking for. Perhaps with this modpack you will find everything you need, with unobtrusive mods that elevate your experience.**
##
##  This modpack contains content from [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)


### For feedback
